feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Information about who/when was an integration artefact undeployed
entry.content:
Hello community,

does someone of you know how to get the information about
- who undeployed a specific integration artefact
- when has an integration artefact been undeployed?

I would assume this information will be stored in some log file because of security and consistency reasons.
I already checked the system logs (http log and trace log) and the APIs for Cloud Integration. So far I couldn't find a place to get this information.

Would appreciate any idea where I could do have a look into.

entry.title: How to Gather Error Logs in sap CPI.
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I have a requirment, Once i get the data into CPI, i split the each record and will post to two APIs in paralell, My req here when ever there is an error i need to send an email of all errors with source data, each record i send an email, but how to merger all these records into, Since im using router, i cant able to use gather option and even gather is not working in exception subprocess, Can anyone help on this requirment.

 

Thank You!

#cpi#sapcpi#gather#ErrorHandling

entry.title: How to configure CPI to access diferent Successfactors environments?
entry.content:
We have a single CPI environment and two different Successfactors environments.
How can we configure CPI to access the desired Successfactors environment, to read data from a specific environment, without having to republish the integration flow every time the externalized configuration values ​​change?
Is this possible?

Thanks.

entry.title: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can someone suggest us how to handle attachment in CPI while posting the data into rest API(HTTP service).

Scenario: we used to receive the data from Amazon S3 bucket in the form of XML and in between there would be some logics so after completion of logics we have to post the data as an attachment. Can anyone suggest how to achive this requirement in CPI.

Thank you!

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Cloud Integration requirement
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is the below scenario possible using SAP BTP Integration Suite (Cloud Integration).

Our Integration Suite is hosted on public cloud.. Is the below scenario possible to achieve using SAP BTP Integration Suite? Can we establish the connectivity using Kafka adapter? What information Should I collect from Sender system? Could you please let me know the steps needed to achieve this requirement? Thank you in advance for your inputs..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Test Connectivity to SAP Ariba - How to get Host URL
entry.content:
Hello Experts ..

We tried to Integrate SAP Ariba to ServiceNow using SAP BTP Integration Suite.

As a first step, trying to connect SAP BTP Integration Suite to SAP Ariba thru "Connectivity Tests".

Question: How do we get Host url of SAP Ariba?

We tried with https://S1.Ariba.com etc.. but getting "Couldn't connect to Hot".

Could you please help.

entry.title: Remove spaces in header in IFLOW
entry.content:
Hi Team

I want to convert a csv file to an xml file, but when I'm creating the xsd file there are errors because there are spaces in the header tags

How can I remove spaces in the header?

Should I use groovy script?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: IDOC Adapter in SAP CPI- Best Choice between the Content Types
entry.content:
Hi Team,

CPI offers 2 types of Content types for IDoc Adapter.

1. text/xml- that accepts multiple IDocs

2. application/x-sap.idoc - Accepts only single IDoc.

We are trying to build a generic Iflow that connects IDocs to respective SAP system.

what is the best choice to use in our IDoc adapter (application/x-sap.idoc / text/xml)?

entry.title: Download com.sap.it.api.mapping.* jar file
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use com.sap.it.api.mapping.* in IntelliJ. However it results in an error due to missing JAR. Can someone help with resources from where I can download this?

Note : I have already imported the Script API and Generic API jar from https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#cloudintegration

Best Regards

entry.title: SAP CPI: JDBC On-premise database connectivity error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While connecting to the on-premise MYSQL server from the CPI we are facing the below error. 
Even though i have completed all the prerequisites:
1. Configured the cloud connector setup under the TCP protocol and the status is reachable.

2. Deployed the required sql drivers.
3. Configured the JDBC data source 

 

Error:
"org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection; nested exception is com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: The TCP/IP connection to the host localhost, port 1112 has failed. Error: "The driver received an unexpected pre-login response. Verify the connection properties and check that an instance of SQL Server is running on the host and accepting TCP/IP connections at the port. This driver can be used only with SQL Server 2005 or later.". ClientConnectionId:130a9bdc-ccd1-4420-8277-51b57c4249a7, cause: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: The TCP/IP connection to the host localhost, port 1112 has failed. Error: "The driver received an unexpected pre-login response. Verify the connection properties and check that an instance of SQL Server is running on the host and accepting TCP/IP connections at the port. This driver can be used only with SQL Server 2005 or later.". ClientConnectionId:130a9bdc-ccd1-4420-8277-51b57c4249a7"

Please help to resolve the issue.

Thanks,

Naveen

entry.title: How to get the error details in SAP CPI when calling via HTTPS?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

This is what I am trying to do.

I will call HTTPS from Postman, and the integration flow itself will show failure, which is my intention.

At the point when I call from Postman, the body of message only shows "An internal server error occured: The MPL ID of the failed message is : ......." and returned 500 internal server error as error code.

However, what I expect is that after calling from Postman, the body of message can show the details of error, just like what can be observed in SAP CPI. 

Plus, I hope that I can change the error code as well. Now it is 500 but is it possible to change it?

I am aware that this should be done by some groovy script. Does anyone know how to achieve this?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: API Proxy Authentication
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created API Proxy with the API provider(On-Prem) and adding policies verifykey. Problem is that when i test API Proxy with the API key then it throws an error 401 Unathorized. Please see the below Screenshots.

entry.title: Connection ECC to CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working on a project that requires sending data (CSV) from ECC to SFTP server through CPI.

I have configured the destination in SM59 as follows:

  • Connection Type: G
  • Target URL: CPI endpoint and prefix
  • Logon & Security:
    • User: Client ID
    • Password: Client Secret
    • SSL Certificate: Default SSL Client (I have also imported the SSL certificate into STRUST)

However, when I test the connection, a prompt appears (screenshot attached) asking for a username and password. I have tried various credentials, including:

  • CPI user/password
  • Client ID/Client Secret

Unfortunately, all attempts have failed.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue? I would greatly appreciate any guidance or suggestions to resolve this.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards

entry.title: Append Option for SharePoint Receiver Adapter
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a provision to append the existing file with new content using the standard Microsoft SharePoint Receiver adapter ?
currently I see the options for Default, Rename, Replace and Dynamic as Handling for Existing Files(also attached the screenshot below) but no option for "Append"
is there any workaround for this option ?

Expecting a similar functionality as we have for the standard SFTP receiver adapter with append option.

entry.title: Is it possible to integrate two different SuccessFactors instances? Not in same landscape!
entry.content:
Hello Dear Members,

I would need your inputs on this question.

My customer has a requirement to integrate two different SuccessFactors landscapes, where data for one legal entity needs to be transferred from the Parent Instance to the Child Instance via SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) or any other possible way.

  • Is this integration technically feasible?
  • If yes, what challenges might we face during implementation?
  • If not, are there any recommended workarounds?

Additionally, can the integration include all data (e.g., employee master data, payroll-related information, organizational structure, etc.), or is it limited to transferring only a Mini Master Data (such as Employee Profile)?

Looking forward to insights from the community on best practices or possible limitations for such an integration.

Best regards,

Siva

entry.title: It is now possible to sync Time Off Leave in SF with MS Teams Calendar. Can same be done in Slack?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

As of this release it is possible to sync Time Off status between SAP SF and MS Teams (works both ways).
Do you know if similar can be done with Slack tool as well? For SAP SF to send Time Off leave information to Slack and update status there as well for Out of office?

Thanks in advance!

Djurdja

entry.title: SAP CPI Groovy Script Blanked Out
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing a bit of a situation - we were working on developing an integration and had deployed it last night and everything looked good.

This morning, we opened it and the Groovy Script has gone blank - it shows 0 bytes.

We tried to download from deployed and reupload from Manage Integration Content, but it still shows 0 bytes.

If anyone has any ideas on how to recover it, it would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Sarthak

entry.title: Parsing multipart/mixed-form data format in BTP CI
entry.content:
Dear Community,

BTP CI receives multipart/mixed-form data from OData V4 API, which requires parsing the message in case of an error. Error description appears in the multipart data response, technically  OData API call was successful,it says HTTP 200 ok.
Based upon data content received from OData, BTP CI derived whether a call has been processed successfully or not.

For that BTP CI is required to parse this message. and it is expected to read JSON structure of the error description and HTTP content text ( HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found) in the example of format,  how this will be achieved through BTP CI?

Example of Multipart/mixed data:

 --789901289D3B067293B4A5D8BC2033B80
        Content-Type: application/http
        Content-Length: 1279
        content-transfer-encoding: binary
        
        HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found
        Content-Type: application/json;odata.metadata=minimal;charset=utf-8
        Content-Length: 1097
        
        {
        "error": {
            "code": "/SCWM/ODATA_API/126",
            "message": "task item 1 doesn't exist in warehouse1.",
            "target": "$Parameter/_it",
            "@SAP__core.ContentID": "1",
            "details": {
                "message": "task 1 doesn't exist in warehouse."
            }
        }
    }

--789901289D3B067293B4A5D8BC2033B80--


Thank you in advance.

Yours sincerely,

Sateesh

entry.title: Update huge data with CPI JDBC
entry.content:
We have database table that has more than 20 million records, and create a iflow job to run daily to SELECT all records check and do some pressing then UPDATE them.

Processing all of them once not working because JDBC taking so much time for SELECT query only.

 

So, I add loop to call 10,000 records in each iteration and UPDATE them . it is working but taking time, more than 7 hours to finish 500,000 records that means to finish all records could take more than one whole day.

What is the best solution to increase the performance?
